title: SIMBA
subtitle: Scalable Similarity Search Benchmarking Architecture
summary: Scalable similarity search architecture for chess decision spaces.
resumeBullets: Built a large-scale similarity search system for chess positions using FAISS and evaluation-aware embeddings.

title: Poker Behavior Modeling
subtitle: Predictive strategy analytics

title: Augmented KGE Research
subtitle: Knowledge graph embedding evaluation
